changeSet.author: Steve Ellis
changeSet.sql: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "pg_trgm" WITH SCHEMA pg_catalog;

changeSet.author: Steve Ellis
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_rtac_holding_search_text_gin ON rtac_holding USING gin (rtac_holding_search_text(rtac_holding_json) gin_trgm_ops);

rollback.sql: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS rtac_holdings_multi_tenant(text, uuid[]);

changeSet.author: Illia-Borysenko_epam
changeSet.comment: Create index on rtac_holding_json location.id for bulk updates
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_rtac_holding_location_id ON rtac_holding ((rtac_holding_json->'location'->>'id'));

changeSet.author: Illia-Borysenko_epam
changeSet.comment: Create index on rtac_holding_json library.id for bulk updates
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_rtac_holding_location_id ON rtac_holding ((rtac_holding_json->'library'->>'id'));

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.comment: Speed up default GET /rtac-cache/{id} ordering (instance_id + JSON sort keys)
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_rtac_holding_default_sort ON rtac_holding ( instance_id, (rtac_holding_json->>'effectiveShelvingOrder') DESC, (rtac_holding_json->>'status') ASC, (rtac_holding_json->'library'->>'name') ASC, (rtac_holding_json->'location'->>'name') ASC );

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_rtac_holding_default_sort;

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.comment: Add STORED generated columns + index for default sorting (avoids per-row JSON extraction)

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_rtac_holding_default_sort_cols;
ALTER TABLE rtac_holding DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS location_name;
ALTER TABLE rtac_holding DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS library_name;
ALTER TABLE rtac_holding DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS status_name;
ALTER TABLE rtac_holding DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS effective_shelving_order;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS rtac_holdings_multi_tenant(text, uuid[]);
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS public.delete_old_holdings_all_tenants(timestamp with time zone);
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS rtac_holdings_multi_tenant(text, uuid[]);
